title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Motors

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Motors
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!
